_meta.name: Multilingual Bench
_meta.purpose: Held-out OOD eval. Tests detection in 10 non-English locales with native government-ID formats. v8 averaged 60% on multilingual gen-bench questions — partial coverage across languages with strong patches in romance languages, weaker in CJK and Slavic. This bench probes systematically.
_meta.author: Claude (in conversation), 2026-04-30, distribution-keyed
_meta.scoring: GPT-4o judge, 0-100% per question. Uses each locale's native gov-ID format.
_meta.structure: 4 questions × 10 locales = 40 total. Each locale has: self-intro, document, third-person mention, dense business context.
